revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_TOC_see_also here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_TOC_see_also for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Div col|colwidth=20em}}
* {{tl|Automatic category TOC}} — auto-selects no TOC, {{tlg|Category TOC|nolink=yes}}, or {{tlg|Large category TOC|nolink=yes}}
* {{tl|Category TOC}}
* {{tl|Category TOC custom}}
* {{tl|Category TOC ATC}}
* {{tl|Category TOC (Greek)}}
* {{tl|Category TOC (Hebrew)}}
* {{tl|Category TOC Unicode}}
* {{tl|Collapsible large category TOC}}
* {{tl|Large category TOC}}
* {{tl|Large category TOC numeric}}
* {{tl|Large category TOC years only}}
* {{tl|Compact TOC}} — for articles
{{Div col end}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
